insight.headline: Merchant-owned delivery
insight.what_changed: Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping. Shipping configuration is moving from legacy delivery profiles to Markets. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration starting in API version 2026-07.
insight.developer_impact: Developers need to update their integrations to use the new market-driven shipping APIs. They should configure shipping directly on a market, which helps apps support different shipping settings for each market. The deprecation of merchant-owned delivery profile APIs may break existing functionality, so developers should review their code and update it accordingly. They can use the new market-driven shipping configuration APIs to support different shipping settings for each market.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will be able to configure shipping directly on a market, which helps them support different shipping settings for each market. This change may require merchants to update their shipping configurations.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it allows for more flexible and market-specific shipping configurations. It also aligns with Shopify's move towards market-driven shipping, which is a more modern and scalable approach to shipping configuration.

also_worth_knowing.text: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting from API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The React SDK added typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants, adding variants to cart, and sending buyers to express checkout.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping options per market.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package now infers a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package when one is not provided.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package now supports deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API, starting from API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: The GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a lineItem field, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

updates.title: Discount application information now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API
updates.summary: Discount application information is now available for draft orders on the Customer Account API, starting from GraphQL Customer Account API version 2026-07.

updates.title: `discountedUnitPrice` on `DraftOrderLineItem` Customer Account API deprecation
updates.summary: The discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object in the Customer Account API is now deprecated, replaced by approximateDiscountedUnitPrice.

updates.title: `BusinessEntity` now exposes `legalEntityId` in the GraphQL Admin API
updates.summary: The BusinessEntity type in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a new legalEntityId field, starting from API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping
updates.summary: Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated in favor of market-driven shipping, which configures shipping per market.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and more

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new features, including the OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum, draft order deposit fields, and market-driven shipping configuration. Additionally, the GiftCard object now includes a lineItem field, and the BusinessEntity type includes a new legalEntityId field.

themes.title: Hydrogen updates and deployments
themes.detail: Hydrogen has been updated with new features, including the ability to deploy to Vercel. The @shopify/mini-oxygen and @shopify/cli-hydrogen packages have also been updated with minor changes and patch changes, respectively.

themes.title: Deprecations and removals
themes.detail: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, and the discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object in the Customer Account API is now deprecated. Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are also deprecated for market-driven shipping.

actions.text: Update integrations to use non-cumulative marketing engagements
